Quoits is a traditional game that involves throwing rings over a set of pins or stakes

Quoits has many variations and rules depending on the region the equipment and the skill level of the players 
Some of the common types of quoits are deck quoits indoor quoits long game and East Anglian quoits 
Quoits is a game that requires accuracy strategy and physical coordination It can be played for fun for competition or for social interaction 
Quoits is a game that has a rich history and a loyal following among enthusiasts

column2: Relay Batons Set Of 6 Aluminium Senior
column3:
Relay batons are cylindrical metal or plastic objects that are used in relay races where runners pass the baton from one to another as they complete their segments of the race 
Relay batons are designed to be lightweight smooth and easy to grip so that they can be transferred quickly and securely without slowing down the runners 
These Relay batons come in a set of 6 different colours The standard length of a relay baton is 30 cm and the standard diameter is 13 mm 
Relay batons must comply with the rules and regulations of the governing body of the sport such as the International Association of Athletics Federations (IAAF) or the International Paralympic Committee (IPC)
Aluminium Relay Baton Set
 - Senior diameter relay baton made from Aluminium
 - Set of 6

The rubber discus is a training tool that can help athletes improve their throwing technique and strength 
Unlike the metal or wooden discus used in competitions the rubber discus is softer and lighter making it safer and easier to handle 
The rubber discus also has a lower rim weight which means it does not fly as far or as fast as the competition discus 
This allows the thrower to focus more on the form and accuracy of the throw rather than the distance and speed 
The rubber discus is ideal for beginners young athletes or anyone who wants to practice throwing without risking injury or damage to the equipment or surroundings
Rubber Discus are ideal for use in schools or as a training discus

column2: Yonex Mavis 600 White Shuttles - Fast (Red) Speed
column3:
Yonex Mavis 600 Nylon Shuttlecocks is the new benchmark in nylon shuttles. quick flight stability and good shuttle feel for confidence in tight nets make this the leading Mavis shuttle.
Wing Rib Technology - Change in the design of the stems of the skirt deflects the air around the shuttle into the skirt. 
The links between the stems draw air inside the shuttle to help push the skirt out and maintain shuttle shape. 
The decelerates the shuttle faster to fly more like a feather.
Cork Base - Feather shuttles use cork bases as synthetic materials can be lighter and bounce more readily off the strings. 
The use of a cork base shows the commitment behind this shuttle to make it play like a premium shuttle.
Quick Recovery Time and Accurate Flight Performance - Use of Wing Rib and a Cork base allow the development of the nylon shuttle to act more like a feather. 
This includes how fast the shuttle gains flight stability after the hit (how fast the cork settles in the direction of flight). 
This is key for fast flat exchanges around the net where lesser nylon shuttles might still be rotating and that will stop a clean hit.

Ergoshape - Scientifically contoured the Ergoshape provides more comfort and stability in the forefoot and toe area of the shoe.
Round Sole - The YONEX Round Sole is designed to provide all-around support for quick and smooth footwork.

The Yonex EZONE Play Tennis Racket is an entry level racket aimed at recreational/beginner level players
The EZONE Play offers great reliability with effortless power to ensure your journey into tennis is smooth and exciting
ISOMETRIC - Developed over 30 years ago the ISOMETRIC? design increases the sweet spot by 7%* 
Compared to a conventional round frame a square-shaped ISOMETRIC? racquet generates a larger sweet spot by optimizing the intersection of the main and cross strings
ISOMETRIC? technology delivers greater control without sacrificing power

The Yonex Smash Team  Tennis Racket is crafted for entry-level and recreational players who seek a user-friendly and reliable option 
With its balanced design innovative ISOMETRIC? technology and accessible pricing it ensures optimal control and power for players honing their skills or enjoying casual games
Key Features and Benefits
ISOMETRIC? Technology: Enhances the sweet spot by 7% compared to traditional round frames offering improved control without compromising power
Graphite Composite Construction: Combines stiffness and flexibility for added durability and playability ensuring consistent performance
Optimal Weight and Balance: A lightweight 290g frame with a balance point of 335 mm provides stability and manoeuvrability for reliable performance and improved accuracy
Comfortable Grip: Specially designed to minimise vibrations providing a comfortable feel for extended play
Pre-Strung: Arrives ready for play so you can hit the court immediately after purchase

Develop your game with the YONEX Junior Tennis Racket in Ocean Blue and Coral a reliable kids racket designed for junior players 
Designed by tennis icon YONEX the Junior tennis racket combines a comfortable forgiving feel with an eye-catching visual design to help young players enjoy the sport as they hone their skills whether they?re playing casually with friends or setting their sights on the ATP or WTA Tour 
The bold base is overlaid with colourful visual aids to help juniors learn positioning 
Made for young players stage the lightweight aluminium construction allow easy handling while the increased headsize provides a bigger sweet spot so kids have more margin for error as they learn the game

They also have a smooth and stretchy fit that hugs your curves and moves with you whether you are hiking skiing running or lounging

They are made of breathable and moisture wicking fabric that helps regulate body temperature and prevent chafing whilst promoting blood flow 
The shorts have a snug fit that contours to the body and reduces bulk making them ideal for layering under other garments 
The shorts also feature a wide elastic waistband that ensures a secure and comfortable fit

Henselite bowls score cards are designed to help players keep track of their scores and progress in lawn bowls games 
Henselite bowls score cards can be used for singles pairs triples or fours games and have spaces for recording the names of the players the date the venue the rink number the start and end times and the final score 
Henselite bowls score cards also have a section for marking the shots scored in each end using symbols such as X for a shot O for a toucher and T for a tied end

column2: BBE Matte Black Sparring/Bag Boxing Gloves
column3:
The Matte Black Sparring/Bag Boxing Gloves a fusion of style and performance. Crafted with PU leather to mimic the fit and feel of a full leather glove these gloves offer a premium experience. 
Designed for ultimate protection the thumb area is reinforced with an additional lining and stitched latex bonding ensuring stability and safety during intense sessions. 
The gloves sleek matte black finish complemented by spot gloss printing adds a touch of sophistication to your boxing gear.
Not only are they stylish they are also made from quality vegan materials aligning with ethical and sustainable choices. 
These gloves combine both style and functionality offering superior protection and a sleek appearance. 
12oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh between 45-51kg.
 Lighter gloves are typically used for speed training pad work or boxers who prefer a lighter feel.
14oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh between 65-73kg. 
Slightly heavier gloves are suitable for both training and sparring as provide a good balance between speed and padding.
16oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh 74kg and above. 
They offer the most padding and protection reducing the impact and risk of injury during sparring sessions. 
Features:
Premium construction: Crafted from PU leather these gloves offer a luxurious feel and durability for long lasting performance
Enhanced protection: Reinforced thumb area ensures stability and safety during intense training
Sleek design: Matte black finish with spot gloss printing adds sophistication to your gear

The CLUB Leather Sparring/Bag Boxing Gloves your ultimate choice for intensive sparring and bag workouts. 
These gloves are meticulously crafted with pre-curved padding and full-grain leather construction ensuring optimal fit and durability. 
Equipped with high density moulded latex shock foam and closed-cell EVA padding these gloves effectively attenuate shock providing exceptional protection for your hands during rigorous training sessions. 
The combination of these materials ensures superior shock absorption reducing the impact on your hands and minimising the risk of injuries.
The thumb area is specially designed with an additional inner lining reinforced with stitched latex bonding providing ultimate protection and stability to this vulnerable area. 
With double stitching these gloves are highly durable ensuring long lasting  performance even during the most demanding workouts. 
Moreover these gloves feature antimicrobial foams and linings guarding against odours and maintaining a fresh feel after multiple uses. 
12oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh between 45-51kg. Lighter gloves are typically used for speed training pad work or boxers who prefer a lighter feel.
14oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh between 65-73kg. Slightly heavier gloves are suitable for both training and sparring as provide a good balance between speed and padding.
16oz boxing gloves are ideal for fighters that weigh 74kg and above. They offer the most padding and protection reducing the impact and risk of injury during sparring sessions. 
Features
Durable protection: Full-grain leather and high density shock foam ensure lasting durability and superior protection
Focused thumb support: Reinforced with stitched latex bonding the thumb area provides stability and protection
Long lasting & hygienic: Double stitching enhances longevity while antimicrobial features prevent odours

The CLUB FX Sparring/Bag Boxing Gloves are the ultimate choice for intensive sparring and heavy bag sessions. 
Crafted with precision using premium PU leather these gloves offer unparalleled durability and comfort ensuring long lasting performance.
Featuring BBE 7S Foam technology which provides three layers of enhanced cushioning via the high-density injection moulded latex shock foam with EVA Padding. 
The gloves are Vegan friendly and are made with anti-microbial foam and linings to guard against  odours. 
These winning boxing gloves combine durability superior shock absorption and breathability to elevate your training. 
Features
Shock resistant: Features 3 layers of enhanced cushioning plus injection moulded latex shock foam
Durable construction: Doubled stitched plus reinforced inner thumb lining
Antimicrobial material: Foam and linings guard against odours and resist bacteria

column2: BBE Matte Black Gel Boxing Focus Pads
column3:
Introducing the Matte Black Gel Boxing Focus Pads meticulously designed to elevate your training. 
These pads feature a gel centre that provides exceptional shock protection ensuring a comfortable and secure experience during intense boxing sessions. 
Crafted by combining foam and air these pads maximise endurance enabling you to push through longer training sessions with reduced fatigue and strain on your hands. 
Moreover the inclusion of antimicrobial foam and lining actively guards against odours ensuring a fresh and hygienic training environment session after session. 
Experience superior shock protection enhanced endurance and a clean training environment with the Matte Black Gel Boxing Focus Pads designed to optimise your boxing sessions.
Features
Exceptional shock protection: Gel centre provides superior shock protection for a secure experience during intense boxing sessions
Maximised endurance: Crafted with a combination of foam and air these pads enable extended training sessions with reduced fatigue and hand strain

Introducing the CLUB Leather Boxing Focus Pads meticulously crafted to elevate your training experience. 
These pads boast full-grain leather construction ensuring enhanced durability and unparalleled comfort throughout your sessions. 
Designed for optimal shock absorption these pads feature BBE 3S Foam a high density material that effectively absorbs impact minimising strain on your hands and enhancing your training endurance. 
Moreover with 38mm of air channel shock-absorbent foam these pads offer increased cushioning and long-lasting durability.
The strike zone is reinforced with 8mm thick gel padding providing added protection and support ensuring a safe and focused training experience. 
Additionally the integration of BBE-Mesh into the rear of the pad enhances breathability keeping your hands cool and dry during intense workouts. 
Elevate your training regimen with these Boxing Focus Pads designed to deliver durability superior shock absorption and breathability for an exceptional boxing session.
Features
Superior shock absorption: Utilising BBE 3S Foam for optimal impact absorption reducing hand strain
Comfortable & durable: Featuring 38mm of air channel shock-absorbent foam for extended cushioning and durability
Enhanced protection: Reinforced with 8mm thick gel padding in the strike zone for added protection and support

column3:
Introducing the CLUB FX Curved Boxing Hook & Jab Pads engineered for durability and performance. 
Crafted from high-end Flex PU these pads boast a robust moulded construction that ensures lasting quality. 
Experience the sensation of full leather gloves with these pads providing an exceptional fit and feel for unparalleled comfort.
Designed with pre-curved shaping and enhanced by palm grip technology these pads offer a secure fit and stability during sparring sessions.
The inner palm grip further reinforces stability allowing you to focus on your training without worrying about slippage or discomfort. 
To maintain freshness antimicrobial foam and linings are incorporated effectively guarding against odours and ensuring a clean hygienic training environment. 
Elevate your training experience with the reliability and comfort of these Boxing Hook & Jab Pads built to enhance your performance and endurance during every session.

Durable construction: Crafted from high-end Flex PU these pads ensure lasting quality for long-term use
Secure fit & stability: Pre-curved shaping and palm grip technology provide a secure fit enhancing stability during sparring
Hygienic: Antimicrobial foam and linings prevent odours maintaining a clean training environment

The BBE PVC Boxing Focus Pads are designed to enhance your boxing training with comfort and durability. 
Material: Made from high-quality PVC these focus pads are built to withstand intense training sessions.
Design: They feature a curved design to better catch punches and provide a more realistic training experience.
Padding: The pads are filled with dense foam to absorb impact and reduce strain on the hands and wrists.
Grip: They come with a secure hand grip and adjustable straps to ensure they stay in place during use.

This reduces distractions and improves precision and consistency during intense gameplay. 
The dartboard?s championship-quality playing surface utilises pioneering Abyss Printing to provide ultra-high contrast printed segments for a captivating longer-lasting modern look. Its stunning visual appeal is only matched by the sisal?s rapid recovery performance to maintain optimal durability through even the most demanding tournament matches.

The longer straighter fibres ensure a more consistent playing surface for a reduction in bounce-outs.

Equipped with a modified ultra-slim plated steel wire spider the Eclipse Pro 2?s removal of external legs notably improves your focus for increased high-scoring potential. 
The dartboard?s modernised design and performance is completed by the addition of a stylish black circumference band to offer greater board stability by keeping the sisal fibres tightly packed in the main scoring areas.

Why tungsten for darts? The UniBoffin explains:-

Tungsten is Swedish for heavy stone and was well named being one of the densest substances known 
The pure metal weighs around 19gms/cc and although this reduces slightly when it is combined with small amounts of eg nickel to produce a more workable material the resultant alloy will still be 50% denser than lead and maybe twice as dense as brass or steel

Dart barrels in high percentage tungsten alloy can hence be far thinner for a given weight and length than ones made from more traditional materials which obviously helps to avoid bed blocking and allows three of them to nestle nicely in the treble 20 with room to spare

Players of all skill levels can throw the Aerobie Superdisc well and enjoy its stable accurate flights 
Its patented spoiler rim and soft rubber edge were developed when inventor Alan Adler set out to design an improved Frisbee 
Conventional flying discs have their center of aerodynamic lift near the discs leading edge in flight thats why they tend to roll to the right for right handed throws and to the left for left handed throws 
By contrast the Superdiscs breakthrough spoiler rim centers the discs aerodynamic lift throughout each flight making the Superdisc a more stable flyer for throwers of all skill levels 
The Superdiscs soft rubber edge provides a great grip for strong throws and remains smooth to catch even after landing on pavement 
Conventional discs often develop sharp scratches and burrs

Liquid Chalk is a fluid that is applied to the hands (or feet) to vastly reduce sweating
Use of the liquid means less worry about losing grip enabling you to concentrate on your training or competition
It does not harm or transfer to equipment and unlike traditional powder block or chalk ball methods for reducing sweat
The liquid forms a non-toxic coating on the hands that blocks sweat and improves adhesion without being tacky 
Another advantage is that it remains active in wet conditions 
It can be used as base for block powder or chalk balls here its use makes the powder last longer 
After use we recommend using soapy water to wash the product off and we encourage the use of a moisturiser after use as the product dries the skin
It does not leave powdery mess that coats equipment and clothes
It is healthier because it vastly reduces dust inhalation especially were its use is actively encouraged by climbing walls
- Physically improves grip
- Enables you to perform better
